title: uentgeto
text: uentgeto Return the current occurrence number within an entity parameter. long uentgeto (UHACT hEnt, long* occNr ); Parameters hEnt Handle to the entity parameter. occNr Current occurrence number (Output). Return Values Table 1. Values returned by uentgeto Value Meaning 0 Success. The occurrence was made current. -66 Occurrence handle specified instead of entity handle -165 The supplied handle is not valid. -1203 The occurrence number is out of range. Use Library: ucall Description uentgeto returns (by reference) the current occurrence number within the specified entity parameter. Because you will usually make occurrences explicitly current by calling uentseto , there will usually be no need to call uentgeto to query the current occurrence number. The following code fragment gets the current occurrence number: Explain this code long occNum; UHACT hEnt; /* get entity handle here */ uentgeto(hEnt, &occNum); Copy Was this topic helpful?
